body:
This fixes a minor bug in the grid constructor and contributes some simple tests to verify correct grid construction. It also adds the syntax

```julia
g = RegularCartesianGrid(Float32, (nx, ny, nz), (Lx, Ly, Lz))
```

for constructing grids with element type `Float32` (for example).
title: Bugfix and tests for RegularCartesianGrid
